name: JM Kastenmeier Courts - Athletic Field Park
description: JM Kastenmeier Courts - Athletic Field Park is a place to play pickleball in Beaver Dam, WI. There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights.

name: Riverside Park
description: Riverside Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Watertown, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Waupun Community Center
fees: Members only — Membership or daily fee required. Call for details.
hours: Monday - Friday from 6:00am - 7:00pm & Saturday from 8:00am - Noon View Full Contact Details Name: Rachel Kaminski Program Director 920-324-7930 parks@cityofwaupunwi.gov Contact Us City Hall 201 E Main Street Waupun, WI 53963 Phone: 920-324-7900 Quick Links City Election Information Permit Requirements Maps City Code Report a Concern Site Links Home Contact Us Staff Login Sitemap a municode design

name: Waupun County Park
description: Waupun County Park is a place to play pickleball in Waupun, WI. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: West End Park
description: West End Park is a place to play pickleball in Waupun, WI. There are 2 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
